tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The core tests (`test_pending_false_when_hidden`, `test_pending_true_when_full`, etc.) extract the expression and evaluate it via Node.js subprocess execution with mocked context, verifying runtime behavior. `test_repo_format_check` and `test_repo_markdown_unit_tests` run actual repo tooling. While `test_expression_differs_from_buggy` and `test_svelte_file_exists` are text-based checks, they are gate tests complementing the behavioral tests.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass test `test_pending_false_when_hidden` checks that the expression evaluates to False when status='pending' and show_progress='hidden'. The original buggy expression `status === 'pending'` would return True, so a stub/unchanged implementation fails. `test_expression_differs_from_buggy` explicitly checks the original buggy line is no longer present. Neither can be satisfied without implementing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors described in the instruction are tested: show_progress='hidden' should not show pending (test_pending_false_when_hidden), show_progress='full'/'minimal' should show pending (test_pending_true_when_full, test_pending_true_when_minimal), backward compatibility when show_progress is undefined (test_pending_true_when_progress_undefined), and tab indentation requirement (test_tab_indentation).
